profile.name: Tanapon Yurawan
profile.intro: I am a software developer with a strong interest and expertise in Full-stack Development, Automation Systems, and Cybersecurity.

projects.title: Computer Science Testing & Evaluation Hub
projects.description: Developed and deployed a scalable online coding examination platform replacing paper-based exams with automated real-time evaluation. Integrated Judge0 API and Monaco Editor to support in-browser assessments across 5+ languages, with live leaderboards and concurrent execution via Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

projects.title: Credential Deduplication Automation
projects.description: Reduced CloudSEK credential report processing time from 30+ minutes to under 1 minute by building a full-stack automation pipeline. Eliminated manual deduplication across thousands of records using PostgreSQL upsert logic and an n8n workflow engine.

projects.title: SOC Alert Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Integrated CrowdStrike APIs into a centralized n8n dashboard to aggregate, filter, and enrich security alert metadata — streamlining incident triage and reducing manual lookup time across distributed SOC workflows.

projects.title: Automated Task Notification System
projects.description: Engineered a Slack notification workflow that polls REST APIs every 2 hours and auto-tags assignees for overdue tasks, achieving zero missed deadlines across the SOC team.

projects.title: Web Vulnerability Pentesting
projects.description: Identified 20 security vulnerabilities across client API endpoints via grey-box penetration testing — including Broken Access Control, XSS, and Parameter Tampering. Delivered severity-graded remediation reports with mitigation guidance for each finding.
